justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'tomorrow in the afternoon between 14 and 16' as June 1st, 14:00 to 15:00.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently booked the appointment in two turns without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, resulting in a successfully booked appointment with all details confirmed.
